title: astronia candolleana
intro: Astronia candolleana, also known as the candol's astronia, is a tropical plant species native to the Philippines and Malaysia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily used to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Astronia candolleana include reducing pain and swelling, as well as promoting wound healing and skin regeneration. Astronia candolleana is typically prepared as an infusion or decoction for herbal remedies, and it is also used as a poultice to apply directly to affected areas.
